    Index

    A

    action() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.AuditLog
    The action name recorded in the audit entry (e.g.
    AuditLog - Annotation Type in io.signoz.springboot.annotation
    Records a structured audit-trail entry every time the annotated method is invoked.

    C

    captureArgs() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.AuditLog
    Whether to capture and log method arguments in the audit entry.
    captureResult() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.AuditLog
    Whether to capture the return value in the audit entry.

    F

    FULL - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Replace the entire value with Masked.replacement() (default).

    I

    io.signoz.springboot.annotation - package io.signoz.springboot.annotation
     

    M

    Masked - Annotation Type in io.signoz.springboot.annotation
    Marks a method parameter, field, or return value as sensitive so that it is redacted before being written to any log output.
    Masked.MaskingStrategy - Enum in io.signoz.springboot.annotation
    Masking strategies available for @Masked.

    O

    operationName() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Traced
    Name of the OpenTelemetry span.

    P

    PARTIAL - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Show first 2 and last 2 characters; mask the rest with *.
    pattern() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked
    Custom regex pattern used when Masked.MaskingStrategy.REGEX is chosen.

    R

    recordException() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Traced
    Whether to record exceptions thrown by the method on the span.
    REGEX - Enum constant in enum io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Apply a custom regex defined in Masked.pattern().
    replacement() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked
    Custom replacement string used when Masked.MaskingStrategy.FULL is chosen.
    resourceId() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.AuditLog
    SpEL expression evaluated against the method arguments to extract the resource ID.
    resourceType() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.AuditLog
    The type of resource being acted upon (e.g.

    S

    SigNozLog - Annotation Type in io.signoz.springboot.annotation
    Injects a private static final SLF4J Logger field named log into the annotated class at compile time, equivalent to Lombok's @Slf4j.
    strategy() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked
    The masking strategy to apply.

    T

    tags() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Traced
    Key=value pairs attached as span attributes, e.g.
    topic() - Element in annotation type io.signoz.springboot.annotation.SigNozLog
    Custom topic/name for the logger.
    Traced - Annotation Type in io.signoz.springboot.annotation
    Wraps the annotated method (or all methods of the annotated type) in an OpenTelemetry span, enabling distributed tracing visible in SigNoz.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum io.signoz.springboot.annotation.Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
